_comment: Edit here to enrich timeline tooltips. Consumed by lib/render-report.ts.

605.label: Express Entry draw #605
605.desc: CRS cutoff (French-language) — verify against IRCC draw list.

667.label: Express Entry draw #667
667.desc: IRCC draw number; verify against current IRCC round list.

873.label: Express Entry draw #873
873.desc: IRCC draw number; verify against current IRCC round list.

IMM10003.label: Acknowledgement of Information (AOI)
IMM10003.desc: Internal acknowledgement; not a user-facing form.

IMM1017.label: Medical Report (IMM 1017E)
IMM1017.desc: Panel physician uses this to record your immigration medical exam. Issued by IRCC after an upfront medical request.

IMM1017B.label: Upfront Medical Report
IMM1017B.desc: Used when you book your medical before IRCC asks (Express Entry / work / study).

IMM1208.label: Temporary Resident Visa Approval Letter
IMM1208.desc: Notification of TRV (visitor visa) approval. Issued by IRCC once your temporary resident application is approved.

IMM1209.label: Temporary Resident Visa Letter (Notice)
IMM1209.desc: Generic TRV-related correspondence from IRCC; can indicate a decision, request, or refusal notice. Check the letter body for the exact outcome.

IMM5257.label: Application for Temporary Resident Visa
IMM5257.desc: TRV / temporary resident application form used by visitors, including business visitors.

IMM5257B.label: Application for Temporary Resident Visa — Business

IMM5257E.label: Application for Temporary Resident Visa — Extended Stay
IMM5257E.desc: TRV form for stays extending beyond the default visit period.

IMM5409.label: Statutory Declaration of Common-Law Union
IMM5409.desc: Used when common-law partners need to declare their relationship.

IMM5476.label: Use of Representative (Visitor / TRV)
IMM5476.desc: Authorizes a representative to act on your behalf for a TRV or study/work permit file.

IMM5645.label: Family Information (TRV / study / work)
IMM5645.desc: Family info form for temporary residence applicants.

IMM1102.label: Student Permit Letter (Generic)
IMM1102.desc: Generic study permit correspondence from IRCC; read the body for decision / request outcome.

IMM1294.label: Study Permit / Study Permit Extension Approval
IMM1294.desc: Official approval notification for a study permit (new / extension). Used for both DLI-based study permit and program changes.

IMM5001.label: Application for Study Permit Made Outside Canada
IMM5001.desc: Study permit application form for applicants applying from outside Canada.

IMM5009.label: Application for Study Permit Made Inside Canada
IMM5009.desc: Study permit application form for applicants already in Canada.

IMM5509.label: Application to Renew/Extend Study Permit
IMM5509.desc: Used to extend or change conditions of an existing study permit from inside Canada.

IMM5709.label: Application to Change Conditions / Extend Stay (Generic TRV)
IMM5709.desc: Generic TRV application used to extend a stay or change conditions (visitor record, restoration of status).

IMM5710.label: Application to Change Conditions / Extend Stay (Study)
IMM5710.desc: Used for changing study permit conditions or extending stay from inside Canada.

IMM5740.label: Application for Restoration of Temporary Resident Status
IMM5740.desc: Restores your temporary resident status if it lapsed before you applied to extend.

IMM5928.label: Application for Temporary Resident Visa — Student (TRV-S)
IMM5928.desc: TRV form for study permit holders travelling outside Canada and re-entering.

IMM1102W.label: Work Permit Letter (Generic)
IMM1102W.desc: Generic work permit correspondence from IRCC; read the body for decision / request outcome.

IMM1295.label: Work Permit / Extension Approval
IMM1295.desc: Official approval notification for an employer-specific or open work permit (new / extension).

IMM5488.label: Application for Work Permit (Outside)
IMM5488.desc: Work permit application form used when applying from outside Canada.

IMM5711.label: Application to Extend Stay on a Work Permit (Inside)
IMM5711.desc: Used to extend a work permit from inside Canada.

IMM5993.label: Application for Interim Work Permit / Letter
IMM5993.desc: Interim / bridging work permit notification issued while IRCC processes an open work permit.

IMM5974.label: Portal Notification – Temporary Resident Work Permit Application
IMM5974.desc: Portal message confirming submission of a temporary resident work permit application via IRCC Secure Account.

IMM1344.label: Application to Sponsor, Undertaking
IMM1344.desc: Sponsorship application used by the person sponsoring a family member.

IMM5406.label: Additional Family Information
IMM5406.desc: Required for permanent residence: lists immediate family members of every applicant 18+.

IMM5532.label: Relationship / Sponsorship Evaluation
IMM5532.desc: Documents relationship between sponsor and sponsored family member.

IMM5669.label: Schedule A – Background / Declaration
IMM5669.desc: Schedule to IMM 0008 for permanent residence.

IMM5670.label: Sponsor Undertaking (Group of Five)
IMM5670.desc: Used by community / group-of-five sponsorship applications.

IMM5756.label: Sponsor Document Checklist (spouse/partner)
IMM5756.desc: Document checklist for spouses, common-law partners, conjugal partners and dependent children.

IMM5786.label: Express Entry Profile Confirmation
IMM5786.desc: Letter confirming your EE profile is submitted and active in the pool.

IMM5787.label: Express Entry Next Steps Guide
IMM5787.desc: Guidance on what to do after creating or updating an EE profile.

IMM5791.label: Invitation to Apply (ITA)
IMM5791.desc: Official EE invitation. You have 60 days to file a complete application.

IMM5793.label: AOR – Application Receipt (EE)
IMM5793.desc: Acknowledgement of Receipt confirming IRCC got your EE PR application.

IMM5794.label: AOR – Application Receipt (EE)
IMM5794.desc: Acknowledgement of Receipt confirming IRCC got your EE PR application.

IMM1209R.label: Visitor Visa Refusal Letter
IMM1209R.desc: Generic TRV refusal letter from IRCC; details in body. Common refusal grounds: purpose of visit, ties to home country, financial support.

IMM1214.label: Refusal Letter – Temporary Resident Application
IMM1214.desc: Official refusal letter for temporary resident (visitor / TRV / work / study) applications.

IMM1234.label: Visitor Record / Conditions Decision Letter
IMM1234.desc: Notification of conditions imposed on a temporary resident (e.g., visitor record, study permit conditions).

IMM1414.label: Procedural Fairness Letter
IMM1414.desc: Gives the applicant an opportunity to respond to concerns before a final decision.

IMM5008.label: Letter of Introduction / Port of Entry Letter
IMM5008.desc: Confirmation letter for an applicant whose application was approved but requires landing at a Port of Entry.

status_codes.17: Security review started (comprehensive background / criminality / security screening).
status_codes.33: Medical exam initiated OR security review completed (depending on key).
status_codes.108: Medical exam completed and results received.
status_codes.140: Port of Entry letter issued (for landing at POE).
